what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links the attachment att-76e9a2ea, of type board_items, to the target board://item-2469a039 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-2469a039
added timestamp is an ISO 8601 UTC value
No code symbols or executable content present
standouts: References a board item via the URI board://item-2469a039
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that records a board-item link in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What board item item-2469a039 represents and whether the link is still valid
What artifact or content the board_items attachment is meant to attach
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose of an attachment metadata record matches the content; it is a minimal link record with no additional payload.
intention_signals: It appears intended to persist a cross-reference between a channel attachment identifier and a specific board item for later retrieval or audit.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer from an attachment identifier to a board item, supporting lookup and provenance of channel-related artifacts.
